parameters.query: SELECT answer, intent_category FROM clinic_info_cache WHERE clinic_id = $1 AND normalized_question = LOWER(TRIM($2)) AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT kb_type, content, metadata FROM clinic_knowledge_base WHERE clinic_id = $1 AND active = true ORDER BY kb_type;
SELECT name, whatsapp_phone_number_id FROM clinics WHERE clinic_id = $1;
INSERT INTO clinic_info_queries (clinic_id, question, intent_category, answer, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW());

INSERT INTO clinic_info_cache (clinic_id, normalized_question, answer, intent_category, created_at) VALUES ($1, LOWER(TRIM($2)), $3, $4, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (clinic_id, normalized_question) DO UPDATE SET answer = EXCLUDED.answer, intent_category = EXCLUDED.intent_category, created_at = NOW();

parameters.content:
## Esquema SQL Requerido

```sql
CREATE TABLE clinic_knowledge_base (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  clinic_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  kb_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(200),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE clinic_info_queries (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  clinic_id VARCHAR(100),
  question TEXT,
  intent_category VARCHAR(50),
  answer TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE clinic_info_cache (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  clinic_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  normalized_question TEXT NOT NULL,
  answer TEXT,
  intent_category VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(clinic_id, normalized_question)
);
```
